name: production-dac
title: Production DAC with Reed-Solomon Erasure Coding for Enterprise zkEVM L2
hypothesis: A production DAC extending the Validium RU-V6 design with Reed-Solomon erasure coding can achieve 99.9% data availability with 5-of-7 honest minority assumption, attestation latency under 1 second, and verifiable data recovery from any 5 of 7 nodes.
null_hypothesis: Either attestation latency exceeds 1 second for enterprise batch sizes (100KB-1MB), or Reed-Solomon encoding overhead makes the protocol impractical (>5x storage expansion), or data recovery from 5-of-7 nodes fails to reconstruct correctly, or the 99.9% availability target requires more than 7 nodes.
